speaker: Opening brief
text: Wall ahead. Petard is useless unless the hull is square. Infantry are waiting for the lane.

speaker: Wireless operator
text: Driver short of the wall. Infantry still loose. Breach not made.

speaker: Driver
text: Advancing. Slow over broken stone. We are short of the seam.

speaker: Driver
text: Hull square to the seam. Hold us here.

speaker: Infantry liaison
text: Infantry held. They will not enter the smoke until released.

speaker: Gunner
text: Petard away. Wall broken. Dust and brick across the front.

speaker: Sapper team
text: Sappers moving. Breach is passable on the left edge.

speaker: Sapper team
text: Lane marked. Infantry can pass through the tape.

speaker: After-action memory
text: After-action memory: the road remains because other hands made it usable.

speaker: Driver
text: Driver cannot square the hull from here.

speaker: Gunner
text: Gunner has no square shot at the seam.

speaker: Infantry liaison
text: Infantry are too close to fire.

speaker: Sapper team
text: Sappers have no breach to inspect.

speaker: Sapper team
text: Sappers will not mark an uninspected lane.
